Additional exported RCausalML objects

rcausalml-extra-objects.Rd

Documentation placeholder for exported objects that are also documented in other function/class help pages.

Details

MultiArmCausalBoost is an R6 class for multi-arm causal boosting. multi_arm_ATE and multi_arm_PEHE are evaluation helpers used by that class. coef is the exported S3 generic with methods documented on their respective class help pages.

See also

load_multi_arm_causal_boost, save_multi_arm_causal_boost, run_multi_arm_causal_boost_example

On this page
